review_title: Very crispy and easy to clean
review_text: This air fryer makes food crispy quickly and the basket is easy to clean. The fan is a little loud but not terrible.
The cooking performance was good at first but the nonstick coating started peeling after a few months. I expected better durability.
The suction is strong and it works well on pet hair. Battery life is shorter than advertised when using boost mode.
It cleans well but it is louder than expected and feels heavy after using it around the whole apartment.
Great suction and easy to maneuver. The price is high and the dust bin is annoying to empty.
The controls are simple and food cooks evenly. There was a plastic smell for the first week and the basket cleanup is not as easy as expected.
Very powerful for smoothies and ice. It is noisy but blends fast and feels sturdy.
The blender worked well for a month but then started leaking from the bottom. Customer support took too long.
Excellent performance and build quality. It is expensive and loud but very durable.
The price is good but it struggles with frozen fruit and ice. It is easy to clean though.
